name: I was partly at fault for slipping at work in Saint George, still get paid?
description: Yes for comp; reduced if suing third party under 50% fault.[1][5]

mainEntity.name: I was partly at fault for slipping at work in Saint George, still get paid?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for comp; reduced if suing third party under 50% fault.[1][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, workers' comp pays regardless of your fault.** Utah/Idaho exclusivity ignores partial blame for employer claims.[1][5] Third-party suits use comparative negligence: recover if under 50% at fault, reduced proportionally. Admit nothing initially. Document hazard prominence. Lawyer assesses split fault accurately.
